395.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
395.description: I didn't have sexual relations with that woman stated Bill Clinton, denying a sexual relationship with Monica Lewinsky. He was later impeached for his relationship with her.

396.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
396.description: Jessica Hahn's rape allegation against televangelist conman Jim Bakker lead to the downfall of the Praise The Lord Network empire that was stealing millions from its followers.

397.title: Judge Judy
397.description: A car owner sues her former friend for damages, and divorcees feud over a semi truck.

398.title: Cheaters
398.description: Joey discovers his childhood sweetheart Christy is having an affair. Cheaters' crewmembers turn peacemakers as a violent confrontation ensues. Hosted by Joey Greco.

399.title: Cheaters
399.description: David's relationship with Megan is faltering and he suspects his best friend Josh is involved.

400.title: Celebrity Damage Control
400.description: When numerous women allege sexual harrassment against Schwarzenegger, his sterling reputation takes a hit, putting the Hollywood hero in need of some tough-as-nails damage control.

401.title: Forensics
401.description: Investigators follow multiple leads as they look into the disappearance of a woman from an Auckland motel. They discover the woman's dangerous, criminal world as they attempt to substantiate their case.

402.title: Judge Judy
402.description: Judge Judy destroys a young man's credit card when he is sued by his ex-girlfriend for making unauthorised charges on their shared account. As the police are arresting a couple, they give a neighbour their keys.

403.title: Judge Judy
403.description: A former nanny denies attacking an autistic child. Then, a man says his cousin's girlfriend misappropriated funds.

404.title: Judge Judy
404.description: A man accuses his estranged son of stealing his truck and tools. The defendant says his father assaulted him.

405.title: Judge Judy
405.description: A woman wants her father to return belongings she left behind when he kicked her out of his house. Then, an Army sergeant says her ex's former wife ruined her clothes and military gear with bleach.

406.title: Judge Judy
406.description: A felon learns that her crime frightened her neighbours' children. Then, a mother storms out of the courtroom in a rage.

407.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
407.description: Team Salvage is tasked with repairing an underwater pipeline and rescuing a concrete houseboat from deep within the mangroves.

408.title: Forensics
408.description: Police try to determine whether a shooting was accidental, homicide or self-defence after a man turns himself in at Palmerston North Police Station claiming to have shot another man.

409.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
409.description: A father and son come face-to-face with what they believe is the ghost of a screaming girl. Plus, a teenager claims to hear the whispers of sinister spirits.

410.title: Obese at 16: My New Lean Life
410.description: Providing viewers with the best in TV, film and entertainment.

411.title: Auction Kings
411.description: Buyers in the Atlanta area searching for those one-of-a-kind items - a vampire hunting kit, anyone? - know exactly where to go, but the quantity is always limited and the prices fluid. `Auction Kings' follows the action at Gallery 63, a storied auction house in Hotlanta with a reputation for selling both bizarre and high-end items. Its owner, Paul Brown, manages his feisty staff and mingles with his customers, bidders and buyers who come from all walks of life.

415.title: Judge Judy
415.description: An ex-couple argue over whether loans have been repaid. A woman accuses her former friend of breaking their lease, defaming her character and stealing her furniture.

416.title: Judge Judy
416.description: A partygoer accuses the birthday boy of throwing a bottle at his car. A woman sues her child's father for repayment of a loan, the balance on a truck, and damage to her car.

417.title: Judge Judy
417.description: A woman accuses her ex-lover of damaging her home while she was on vacation. A neighbour accuses a 6-year-old of damaging a car with his bicycle.

418.title: Judge Judy
418.description: A nurse says a tow-truck driver illegally towed her car.

419.title: Judge Judy
419.description: A softball player accuses a sports manager of scamming her out of $1,300. A 3-year-old is accused of damaging a car. A young man's mother wants reimbursement for preventing his car from being repossessed.

420.title: Judge Judy
420.description: A woman says her ex-girlfriend vandalized her car in a fit of jealous rag. A man accuses his ex of purposely destroying his laptop.

421.title: Operation Repo
421.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

429.description: Just one month before the wedding, Ken is having second thoughts. Imagine the shock when he discovers that his fiancée is having an affair with his best man to be.

430.title: Cheaters
430.description: Love at first sight turns sour in this compelling episode. Chase's suspicions are confirmed by Cheaters: Megan is cheating and taking liberties.

431.title: Crimes That Shook Australia
431.description: Journalist Stan Grant presents this programme that takes a look at some high-profile crimes. Each episode focuses on a particular crime as seen through the eyes of the people who were at the heart of the tragedies. Interviews, dramatic re-enactments and archival footage are used to detail the events leading up to each crime, the crime itself and the aftermath of the unlawful act. It's all used to help piece together the murders, which include the 1996 Port Arthur massacre that resulted in dozens of deaths and serious injuries.
